raw_text:
75. Smart Manufacturing Tooling Engineer

Job Summary  
Develops and manages smart tooling systems integrated with Industry 4.0 technologies for 
automated and optimized production.  
Key Responsibilities  
• Implement smart tooling solutions with  sensors and automation  
• Integrate tooling with MES and smart factory systems  
• Monitor real -time tool performance  
• Improve production efficiency using automation  
• Support predictive maintenance initiatives  
• Collaborate with automation and production teams  
Required Skills  
• Knowledge of Industry 4.0 technologies  
• Automation and sensor integration  
• Manufacturing process expertise  
• Data analysis and problem -solving  
Qualification  
• B.E / B.Tech in Mechanical / Mechatronics / Automation  
Experience  
• 3–8 years  
Salary (India)  
• ₹45,000 – ₹1,00,000 per month
